creative_brief: Split-screen visual: left side shows a long, winding conveyor belt with multiple checkpoints between a farm and a kitchen table. Right side shows a single clean line from farm to a FarmThru hub. Muted, documentary tone.
primary_text:
Rachel's beef travels a fraction of the distance supermarket beef does, from Kempsey to families in Sydney.

Supermarket beef can pass through warehouses spanning thousands of km.

We built FarmThru to close that gap. Around 15 to 20 partner farms across NSW, all traceable.

No commitment. Order online, collect from Brookvale.

We're building something worth owning. Be part of it.

See the general CSF risk warning + offer document.
headline: Closer farms, fairer prices.
description: Farm-direct grocery changing how Sydney families eat. No middlemen.
